ItemTooltip.IceCube:
Sends out a tile-sliding cube of ice
Ice cubes frostburn the target briefly
ItemTooltip.IcyArrow: This enemy's movement speed is noticeably lowered
ItemTooltip.IcyAxe: Cold to the touch... it might freeze your hands
ItemTooltip.IcyPickaxe: Cold to the touch... it might freeze your hands
ItemTooltip.TheSnowball: It's either really hot or really cold. Either way it REALLY hurts
ItemTooltip.LivingWoodAcorn:
Summons a living tree sprout as your chosen familiar
You may only have one familiar summoned at a time
Right click to select various actions for your familiar
Left click to perform your selected action
ItemTooltip.LivingWoodSap: Increases minion damage and knockback by 1
ItemTooltip.DepthScales: 'Evolution has designed this for the deep...'
ItemTooltip.TheRing:
Increases all damage by 2
Increases armor penetration by 2
Increases critical strike chance by 4%
ItemTooltip.IncubatedEgg:
'A gruesome incubation has occurred'
Minion and sentry attacks have a 10% chance to generate a swarm of spiders
ItemTooltip.LeatherSheath:
Sword, axe, and pickaxe strikes deal {0}% damage and the critical strike chance is increased by {1}%
The weapon must be held and not used for {2} seconds
ItemTooltip.WebGun: Fires out a sticky globule of wet web
ItemTooltip.RainStone:
'It's said that this strange stone was torn from an entity that could control the seas...'
Activates or cancels a rainstorm
ItemTooltip.BubbleConch: Creates a barrage of enemy lifting bubbles
ItemTooltip.JellyfishResonator:
Summons The Queen Jellyfish
Only usable on the beach during the day
ItemTooltip.SeaTurtlesBulwark:
Defense increased by 2
Taking damage releases a touchable mote that recovers 25% of the damage you took
ItemTooltip.ArcaneArmorFabricator: A mystical device that can fabricate arcane items
ItemTooltip.MagmaLocket:
Upon contact with lava grants the Lava's Embrace effect for 10 seconds
'Seems to be made out of a familiar material'
ItemTooltip.BloodAltar:
Used to summon the Viscount
Consumes 5 Profane Fragments
ItemTooltip.SpringSteps: Allows you to a triple hop super jump
ItemTooltip.MixTape: Symphonic critical strikes cause an eruption of molten music notes
ItemTooltip.ThoriumHelmet:
'It pulses with energy'
2% increased critical strike chance
ItemTooltip.ThoriumMail:
'It pulses with energy'
2% increased critical strike chance
ItemTooltip.ThoriumGreaves:
'It pulses with energy'
2% increased critical strike chance
ItemTooltip.LifeGem: Increases maximum life by 20 and life regeneration
ItemTooltip.LifeQuartzClaymore: Heals yourself upon hitting an enemy
ItemTooltip.TechniqueBlankScroll: Used in the crafting of unique technique abilities
ItemTooltip.EnchantedCane: Summons a shield that stuns nearby enemies
ItemTooltip.EnchantedStaff: Releases an enchanted beam that restores mana when defeating an enemy
ItemTooltip.LifeShieldLabel: You constantly generate a {0} life shield

ArmorSetBonus.LivingWood: Your Living Wood Sapling's auto attack will home in on enemies
ArmorSetBonus.Icy: An icy aura surrounds you, scorching enemies with freezing flames
ArmorSetBonus.Silk: 25% increased magic damage while above 90% maximum mana

BuffDescription.LivingWoodAcornBuff: This little guy is giving his all to protect the world
BuffDescription.MagmaCharmBuff: Your body has shrunk to a magma larva
BuffDescription.LavaHugBuff: Increases life and mana regeneration every 2 seconds
BuffDescription.EnchantedCaneBuff: You are protected by a magical barrier

Bestiary.ArmyAnt: An aggressive ant that patrols the depths of the jungle in search of prey
Bestiary.Blacksmith: A seasoned craftsman who shapes metal into weapons and tools. His work is as reliable as his temper is steady
Bestiary.DesertAcolyte: The Desert Acolyte is quite nervous, but will sell all manner of equipment to those interested in throwing stuff at monsters
Bestiary.FireAnt: It emerged straight from hell, like a burning ant seeking warmth
Bestiary.StrangeBulb: A bizarre species of plant that hasn't reached its maturity yet. Maybe that's for the best
Bestiary.MahoganyEnt: A sentient mass of mahogany that seeks to protect the jungle's flora through deadly means

NPCChat.Blacksmith_2: A good blade makes all the difference.
NPCChat.Blacksmith_3: I can hear the metal calling already.
NPCChat.Blacksmith_4: Bring me materials, and I’ll make them worth your time.
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_1: We certainly have some strange people around this town, don't we...?
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_2: You didn't see any giant bird shadows while you were out in the desert, did you?
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_3: I had originally stopped just to refill my canteen, but you seem like someone who can deal with a real threat!
NPCChat.DesertAcolyte_4: Have you ever heard tale of the Thunder Birds? Legend says they had long protected our world from cataclysmic threats, before a disagreement between them and three individuals led to their disappearance...

Blacksmith.Content: Strange... the forge hasn't sung a single note today.
Blacksmith.DislikeBiome: Something about {0} throws off my rhythm.
Blacksmith.DislikeCrowded: Too many bodies, too much noise... ruins the craft.
Blacksmith.DislikeNPC: I'd rather keep my distance from {0}.
Blacksmith.HateBiome: {0} suffocates the flame. I won't work like this.
Blacksmith.HateCrowded: This chaos? No forge can breathe in a place like this.
Blacksmith.HateNPC: {0} grinds my patience thinner than steel.
Blacksmith.LikeBiome: {0}... not bad. The forge holds steady here.
Blacksmith.LikeNPC: {0} knows the value of true craftsmanship.
Blacksmith.LoveBiome: Now this—{0}—this is where a forge belongs.
Blacksmith.LoveSpace: Good space, steady air... the forge can finally breathe.
Blacksmith.NoHome: A forge needs a proper home. This won’t do.
Blacksmith.FarFromHome: Being this far from my tools feels... wrong.
Blacksmith.SpecialMoodText: I don’t hammer steel under moonlight. Nothing good comes from it.

DesertAcolyte.Content: The desert speaks in silence... you just have to listen.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeBiome: {0} feels... unnatural. The sands reject it.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeCrowded: Too many voices drown out the whispers of the wind.
DesertAcolyte.DislikeNPC: {0} disturbs the balance I try to keep.
DesertAcolyte.HateBiome: {0} suffocates the spirit of the desert. I cannot remain here.
DesertAcolyte.HateCrowded: This noise... I cannot hear the sands at all.
DesertAcolyte.HateNPC: {0} brings nothing but disruption. I want no part of it.
DesertAcolyte.LikeBiome: {0}... it has some harmony, at least.
DesertAcolyte.LikeNPC: {0} walks a path not so different from mine.
DesertAcolyte.LoveBiome: Yes... {0} resonates with the desert's true voice.
DesertAcolyte.LoveNPC: {0} understands more than they let on.
DesertAcolyte.LoveSpace: The open air... the wind carries clarity here.
DesertAcolyte.NoHome: I need a place where the winds may pass freely.
DesertAcolyte.FarFromHome: Too far... I can no longer feel the desert's presence.
DesertAcolyte.SpecialMoodText: The winds are restless tonight... something stirs beneath the sands.
